commands.review_summary:
The PR scopes chat-specific Control UI sessions.list calls to the active agent, lets configured-only gateway session lists avoid disk-discovered agent stores, adds sessions.list diagnostics/tests, and refreshes generated Swift protocol models.

Reproducibility: yes. the linked user report gives a high-confidence reproduction path: fresh Windows gateway, compare Control UI session switching before and after the first chat reply, and watch sessions.list jump from about 1.7s to 33.9s. I did not execute that live Windows path in this read-only review, so current-main runtime proof remains a validation gap.
commands.review_followup: Maintainer-labeled member PR with no blocking code finding; the remaining action is maintainer review and Windows regression proof before merge.
